reviews.comment:
Demoran mucho en despachar el combustible, hoy había una cuadra de cola. Una vergüenza. Seguramente Horacio Marin si se entera los tajadas a todos por inútiles. Fue a las 2149hs
Hoy otro día, llegue 945 am son 954 y tengo5 autos delante. Horribles impresentables. Terrible ble lo que tradan inconcebible!!!!!!!@@@@!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
They take forever to pump the fuel; today there was a line a block long. A disgrace. I'm sure Horacio Marin will fire them all for being incompetent if he finds out. It was 9:49 PM.
Today, another day, I arrived at 9:45 AM, it's 9:54 AM now, and there are 5 cars ahead of me. Horrid, disgraceful. The wait is unbelievable, inconceivable!

reviews.comment:
Es una YPF ACA que tiene buena atención y dentro de CABA, precios convenientes del combustible. Tiene un Full y no recuerdo si también boxes. Suele tener bastante movimiento y podes llegar a tener que esperar en cola a qué te atiendan pero circula rápido..

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF ACA station with good service and reasonable fuel prices, located within the city of Buenos Aires. It has a full service station and I'm not sure if it also has pumps. It's usually quite busy and you might have to wait in line, but the line moves quickly.
